phase: P3 character actions and playback state machine

releaseApp.notarization: not run; Apple credentials are not configured on this machine

coldLaunch.evidence: Computer Use quit the exact worktree release app with Cmd+Q; the exact binary path was absent from the process list before get_app_state relaunched it. The fresh company screen and tauri://localhost renderer were reached before entering Dramaturgy Smoke Lab.

piRuntime.configuration: The user-authorized live configuration removed the expired ZAI credential and loaded the already-declared openrouter-free provider with a redacted key. No credential is stored in repository evidence.
piRuntime.routingNote: qwen/qwen3-coder:free was exact-catalog valid but its public pool returned a transient 429. A fresh run selected openrouter/free and completed both read and write tool scenarios.

scenarios.name: selected seated employee talking
observed: Computer Use selected Maya directly in the release 3D stage; the accessibility target changed to Open Maya Lin.
The selected seated actor held the social-discuss talking performance across eight independently captured frames, distinct from the read and write performances.

scenarios.name: read tool performance
observed: The real Pi run read haikus.md and replied exactly P3 READ VERIFIED.
The release stage showed the read tool card and the actor's reading performance, distinct from the writing and talking stills.

scenarios.name: write tool performance
observed: The real Pi run created the exact requested file and replied exactly P3 TYPE VERIFIED.
The release stage showed the write tool card, Write semantic label, and typing performance, distinct from reading and talking.

scenarios.name: approval wait versus blocked

blockedComparator.cause: expired external ZAI balance returned upstream 429

observed: The approval state used the dedicated approval label, user-resource cue, 50% Approval pipeline step, amber approval treatment, and live Reject/Approve bar.
The external provider failure used the separate red blocked state and token-exhausted resource cue.
The approval was rejected; the command never deleted the test directory. The directory was later removed by terminal cleanup.

scenarios.name: test artifact cleanup
observed: p3-release-live-smoke.txt was removed from the product workspace after its exact hash and size were recorded.
/tmp/offisim-p3-approval-test-dir, temporary OpenRouter responses, and intermediate polling frames were removed.
The conversation permission mode was restored from Ask to Auto; the OpenRouter free model selection remains active.

runtimeLogScan.classification: No product panic, renderer crash, black-screen, WebGL, GLB/GLTF, or character asset-load failure signature was present. Expected upstream provider 429 responses during provider fallback were external runtime failures and are recorded separately above.
